meta.commit_message: Update plotly requirement from \<6\,\>=5.15.0 to \>=5.15.0\,\<7 \(#4347\) CITATION.cff CODEOWNERS CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE.txt README.md documentation examples mkdocs.yml postBuild process process-tracking-data pyproject.toml tests tracking Update plotly requirement from \<6\,\>=5.15.0 to \>=6.8.0\,\<7 Updates the requirements on \[plotly\]\(https://github.com/plotly/plotly.py\) to permit the latest version. - \[Release notes\]\(https://github.com/plotly/plotly.py/releases\) - \[Changelog\]\(https://github.com/plotly/plotly.py/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md\) - \[Commits\]\(https://github.com/plotly/plotly.py/compare/v5.15.0...v6.8.0\) --- updated-dependencies: - dependency-name: plotly dependency-version: 6.8.0 dependency-type: direct:development ... Signed-off-by: dependabot\[bot\] \<support@github.com\> CITATION.cff CODEOWNERS CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE.txt README.md documentation examples mkdocs.yml postBuild process process-tracking-data pyproject.toml tests tracking Apply suggestion from @je-cook --------- Signed-off-by: dependabot\[bot\] \<support@github.com\> Co-authored-by: dependabot\[bot\] \<49699333+dependabot\[bot\]@users.noreply.github.com\> Co-authored-by: je-cook \<81617086+je-cook@users.noreply.github.com\>
